[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark blue user interface screen titled “Ansgin” with two status panels and a profile avatar on the left.

Main Subject:
A large circular profile avatar appears on the left, next to the title text “Ansgin” and an interface area containing two rounded rectangular panels with icons and level or limit information.

Setting:
The scene is a digital UI on a dark navy background with soft, out-of-focus circular light patterns. The interface is centered within a large rounded rectangle that frames the content.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the title “Ansgin” is displayed in large white text, with a smaller line of text beneath it reading “@6282312370934”. Below the handle, there is a pill-shaped button with grey text reading “FREE USER”. On the left side, a circular avatar has a light grey background and two simple white circular shapes representing a head and shoulders silhouette. In the middle area, there are two side-by-side rounded rectangles: the left one has a red outline and contains a small lightning icon and the text “LIMIT” and “5/5”; the right one has a teal outline and contains a star-like icon and the text “LEVEL GRUP” and “Lv 1”. At the bottom center, there is a faint line of text reading “Hulua Assister [3] · Premium Profile System”. The camera angle is straight-on, with symmetrical layout and consistent spacing.

Practical Summary:
This image is a dark-themed app or web dashboard screen showing a profile avatar and a title with user handle. It also displays a “LIMIT 5/5” panel and a “LEVEL GRUP Lv 1” panel within a rounded framed interface.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
